title: alsine biflora
intro: Alsine biflora, also known as Alsine, is a flowering plant species in the saxifrage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Alsine biflora include the potential treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Alsine biflora can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, although the availability and effectiveness of these preparations may vary.
